scope: Synthetic QSR purchase propensity model monitoring only.
guardrails: All observations and customer records are synthetic.
Metrics and risk labels are deterministic inputs and must not be recalculated.
Narrative hypotheses must not be presented as causes.

deterministic_feature_suggestions.reason: Measure recent movement toward competing QSR merchants with shorter and directional signals.
deterministic_feature_suggestions.linked_evidence: competitor_qsr_share_90d: High drift (PSI=0.0572, mean change=11.26%); competitor_qsr_share_90d: top-10 SHAP feature (mean |SHAP|=0.1253)
